description: Unified RPi monitoring — system health, Docker containers, and Pi-hole DNS

targets.query: SELECT last("container_status") FROM "docker_container_status" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "container_name" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT last("usage_percent") FROM "docker_container_cpu" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "container_name" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT last("usage") FROM "docker_container_mem" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "container_name" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT last("usage_percent") FROM "docker_container_mem" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "container_name" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT last("rx_bytes") FROM "docker_container_net" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "container_name" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT last("tx_bytes") FROM "docker_container_net" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "container_name" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT last("uptime_ns") FROM "docker_container_status" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "container_name" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT mean("usage_percent") FROM "docker_container_cpu" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "container_name" fill(none)
SELECT mean("usage") FROM "docker_container_mem" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "container_name" fill(none)
SELECT mean("usage_percent") FROM "docker_container_mem" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "container_name" fill(none)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(max("rx_bytes"),1s) FROM "docker_container_net" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "container_name" fill(none)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(max("tx_bytes"),1s) FROM "docker_container_net" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "container_name" fill(none)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(max("io_service_bytes_recursive_read"),1s) FROM "docker_container_blkio" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "container_name" fill(none)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(max("io_service_bytes_recursive_write"),1s) FROM "docker_container_blkio" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "container_name" fill(none)

title: RPi — Unified Monitor
